_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: HyperVM
author: hypernest@gmail.com
startup: qemu-system-x86_64 -device qemu-xhci -m {{RAM}} $( [ "${USE_KVM}" == "1" ] && echo "--enable-kvm -cpu host" || echo "-accel tcg,thread=multi,tb-size=128,split-wx=on" ) -smp sockets=1,cores=$(nproc),threads=1 $( [ -z "${ISO_FILE}" ] && echo "" || echo "-cdrom ${ISO_FILE}" ) -drive file={{DISK_FILE}}$( [ "${USE_VIRTIO}" == "1" ] && echo ",aio=native,cache.direct=on,if=virtio" || echo "" ) $( [ -z "${SHARED_DIR}" ] && echo "" || echo "-drive file=fat:rw:${SHARED_DIR}" ) $( [ "${USE_GPU}" == "1" ] && echo "-device virtio-gpu-gl-pci,max_hostmem=256M -display egl-headless" || echo "-vga std" ) $( [ "${USE_VIRTIO_NET}" == "1" ] && echo "-device virtio-net-pci,netdev=n0 -netdev user,id=n0,{{FORWARD_PORTS}}" || echo "-net nic -net user,{{FORWARD_PORTS}}" ) -usbdevice tablet -boot c,menu=on $( [ "${USE_UEFI}" == "1" ] && echo "-pflash OVMF.fd" || echo "" ) -vnc 0.0.0.0:$((SERVER_PORT - 5900)),password -monitor stdio < qemu_cmd.txt

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
apt update
apt install -y qemu-utils wget curl sed

cd /mnt/server

if [ ! -f "disk.qcow2" ]; then
    echo "Creating 100GB qcow2 disk image..."
    qemu-img create -f qcow2 disk.qcow2 100G
else
    echo "Disk image already exists, skipping..."
fi

echo "Downloading OVMF.fd..."
wget -O OVMF.fd https://cdn.bosd.io.vn/OVMF.fd

echo "Downloading netboot.xyz ISO..."
wget -O netboot.xyz.iso https://boot.netboot.xyz/ipxe/netboot.xyz.iso

user_passwd="lemem1234"

echo "Configuring VNC password..."
echo 'change vnc password' > qemu_cmd.txt
echo "$user_passwd" > vnc_raw_passwd.txt
cat vnc_raw_passwd.txt >> qemu_cmd.txt

mkdir -p /home/container/shared
chmod 777 /home/container/shared
chmod 666 qemu_cmd.txt OVMF.fd netboot.xyz.iso vnc_raw_passwd.txt disk.qcow2
echo "Installation complete!"

variables.name: Guest Memory
variables.description: Total RAM for the VM in MB.

variables.name: Enable KVM Acceleration
variables.description: Select '1' to use hardware acceleration (KVM). Select '0' for software emulation (TCG). Note: Your node must support virtualization for KVM to work.

variables.name: ISO File
variables.description: Path to the .iso file for booting (leave blank if not needed).

variables.name: Disk File
variables.description: The main virtual disk file name.

variables.name: Enable UEFI
variables.description: Select '1' for UEFI boot (OVMF), '0' for Legacy/BIOS boot.

variables.name: Enable VirtIO Disk
variables.description: Select '1' for high-performance disk I/O, '0' for IDE emulation.

variables.name: Shared Directory
variables.description: Path to mount a host directory to the VM (e.g., /home/container/shared).

variables.name: Enable VirtIO GPU
variables.description: Select '1' to enable GPU acceleration (requires host GPU), '0' for standard VGA.

variables.name: Enable VirtIO Network
variables.description: Select '1' for high-speed networking, '0' for legacy Realtek card.
